summary: PR #923 (denial-retry-escalation invariant, closes #908) merged — lint issue resolved. Duplicate PR #935 closed. All 4,106 tests passing across 18 packages, 0 failures. Issue #924 (null byte bypass in canonicalizePath) remains open with no branch started — blocker persists across 2 EM runs. Senior coder assigned but no work visible yet. Escalation warning: if no progress by next cycle, will escalate #924 to director. PR queue is now clear (0 open). Sprint goal narrowed to #924 fix + v3.0 readiness.

notableIssues.note: High-severity security regression — null byte bypass in canonicalizePath. Assigned to senior coder, no branch started yet. Persisting 2 cycles.
4 remaining analytics-proposed invariants (no-self-approve-pr, session-action-velocity, shared-state-write-lock, cost-anomaly-circuit-breaker). Backlog — not yet assigned.
v3.0 gate issues (stranger test, ActionContext) — no assignment yet
